Landing.description: Track your emotions, understand your attention habits, and create harmony between focus and digital consumption

EmotionTracking.title: Emotion & Focus Tracking
EmotionTracking.description: Understand your emotional landscape and how it connects to your daily attention patterns. Build self-awareness one moment at a time.
EmotionTracking.feature3_desc: Make informed decisions about your wellbeing

PauseBeforeScroll.title: Pause Before You Scroll
PauseBeforeScroll.description: A gentle 5-second breathing space before you dive into social media. Create awareness before consumption.
PauseBeforeScroll.quote: "Before you dive in, check in with yourself. How are you feeling right now?"

WeeklyInsights.title: Weekly Insights That Matter
WeeklyInsights.description: Gentle data visualizations that help you understand your patterns without overwhelming you

Community.title: Grow with Mindful People
Community.description: Join a supportive community of people on their own journey to digital wellbeing. Share insights, find encouragement, and grow together.
Community.feature1_desc: Private groups for sharing and support
Community.feature2_desc: Share your progress and celebrate wins

Testimonials.title: Stories from Our Community
Testimonials.description: Real experiences from people finding balance in their digital lives
Testimonials.featured: Featured in TechCrunch, Wired, and Forbes
Testimonials.t1_quote: MindTrack helped me understand my scrolling habits. Now I feel more in control of my time and emotions.
Testimonials.t2_quote: The pause feature changed everything. Taking 5 seconds before opening apps made me so much more aware.
Testimonials.t3_quote: Finally, an app that doesn't make me feel guilty. It's like having a gentle friend checking in on me.

Footer.tagline: Find harmony between your digital life and mental wellbeing. Track, reflect, and grow with mindful awareness.
